mapper.sql: id, emp_id, name, type, gender, dept, division, emp_type, mobile, email, first_check_in, origin, biz_type, arrival_date, departure_date

sql.where:
is_deleted = 0
AND type = #{type}
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
AND emp_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{empId}, '%')

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM employee_info
ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, emp_id, name, type, gender, dept, division, emp_type, mobile, email, first_check_in, origin, biz_type, arrival_date, departure_date, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM employee_info WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee_info ( emp_id, name, type, gender, dept, division, emp_type, mobile, email, first_check_in, origin, biz_type, arrival_date, departure_date, is_deleted, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{empId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{gender}, #{dept}, #{division}, #{empType}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{firstCheckIn}, #{origin}, #{bizType}, #{arrivalDate}, #{departureDate}, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update:
UPDATE employee_info
name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, dept = #{dept}, division = #{division}, emp_type = #{empType}, mobile = #{mobile}, email = #{email}, first_check_in = #{firstCheckIn}, origin = #{origin}, biz_type = #{bizType}, arrival_date = #{arrivalDate}, departure_date = #{departureDate}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT id, emp_id, name, type, is_deleted FROM employee_info WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE employee_info SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
